title: Lithuania, Once Occupied by Germany, Is Glad German Troops Are Back
summary_full: Berlin has deployed forces to protect the Baltic country amid fears of increased Russian aggression in Europe. This time, the soldiers were welcomed.
summary_public: Berlin has deployed forces to protect the Baltic country amid fears of increased Russian aggression in Europe. This time, the soldiers were welcomed.
